CustomField.description: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Credit Note", IF(ISBLANK( ATOF__CI_Client_Group__r.Id ), ATOF__I_Opportunity__r.ATOF__O_Outstanding__c, ATOF__I_Total_Price__c - ATOF__I_Payment_Received__c ), 0)
CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Credit Note", IF( ISBLANK(sugati__CI_Client_Group__r.Id), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(sugati__I_Opportunity__r.sugati__S_O_Total_Outstanding_Booking_Currency__c)), sugati__I_Opportunity__r.sugati__S_O_Total_Outstanding_Booking_Currency__c + sugati__CI_Additional_Value__c, sugati__I_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Outstanding__c + sugati__CI_Additional_Value__c), sugati__I_Total_Price__c - sugati__I_Payment_Received__c - sugati__CI_Agent_Commission__c + sugati__CI_Additional_Value__c ), 0)
CustomField.label: Balance Outstanding
